calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B rule-apprehension committed-class behavioural falsifier (MECH-449 active Go/No-Go constitution engaged; supersedes 654i)
items.note: MECH-449-engaging successor to V3-EXQ-654i (FAIL/non_contributory, failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-654i_2026-06-22; conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_demotion_route_mech449). 654i was the CLEANEST conversion-ceiling instance: ALL C1 readiness gates MET + non-degenerate (rule field 0.913, propagation 0.027, MECH-448 demotion LIVE excluding 18.4) yet the load-bearing C2 committed-class entropy lift FAILED -- demotion (order-preserving over F) cannot express the active No-Go WITHDRAWAL conversion needs. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: the 654i autopsy fired the brake (16-17 prior substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies on MECH-309/ARC-062) and refused a same-substrate 654j; this 654j engages a DIFFERENT mechanism -- the newly-built+validated MECH-449 (ARC-107) Go/No-Go eligibility constitution (built 2026-06-21; selection-face falsifier V3-EXQ-689g PASS 3/3; promoted candidate->provisional 2026-06-22). FIXES vs 654i: (1) use_go_nogo_constitution=True + use_dacc=True armed as matched-stack constants on BOTH arms -> the active No-Go is fed ecologically via the MECH-260 recency-share perseveration axis (the autopsy's named 'active No-Go withdrawal' dependency), dropping the F-eligible-but-perseverative winner before the within-eligible arbitration; (2) use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor=True (689e PASS) replaces 654i's per-(arm,seed) manual _calibrate_envelope_floor recalibration; (3) NEW C1f readiness gate -- the active No-Go must be LIVE AND actually SUPPRESSING on both arms, else substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a false weakens). ONLY use_candidate_rule_field is swept (ARM_OFF legacy collapsed rule_state vs ARM_ON matured+active crf_source). PRIMARY DV = committed-class entropy; phased P0(200 e2-train)/P1(90 frozen-encoder bias-head REINFORCE)/P2(60 frozen measure). THREE-BRANCH NO-weakens map: PASS(C1+C2)->supports MECH-309/ARC-062, closes behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-I; FAIL(C1 holds,C2 fails)->conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_active_nogo (genuine signal the Go/No-Go leg ALONE is insufficient; route to next ARC-107 ledger component, NOT a weakens); FAIL(C1 fails)->substrate_not_ready_requeue. claim_ids=[MECH-309,ARC-062]; experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING by itself. Standing-guidance note: commitment-dependent behavioural DV on the incomplete ARC-107 layer (components 2/4/5 open) -- adjudicated runnable because it engages MECH-449 (a new mechanism) and the C1-holds/C2-fails branch routes to the next ledger component rather than re-deriving the ceiling as a verdict; C1f non-vacuity guarantees the No-Go genuinely engaged. Dry-run smoke PASS (both arms end-to-end, exit 0; toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed -- full-scale matures the pool/No-Go). Prefer cloud (689-lineage).

items.title: SD-033b corrected OFC outcome-devaluation behavioural retest (MECH-449 active No-Go engaged; supersedes 485k)
items.note: MECH-449-engaging successor to V3-EXQ-485k (FAIL/non_contributory, failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-485k_2026-06-21). Engages the MECH-449 Go/No-Go eligibility constitution (built 2026-06-21, 689g PASS, promoted candidate->provisional 2026-06-22) so the trained OFC devalued valuation drives an active No-Go WITHDRAWAL of the previously-preferred candidate (demotion-alone cannot express it). FIXES: (1) MECH-449 constitution armed as matched-stack constant on both demotion-on arms + injected viability No-Go at the devaluation comparison; (2) in-band re-rank gain 1.5/0.3 (no +/-0.5 clamp saturation); (3) C2 discrimination protected (go_nogo_signals=None, demotion-alone as 485j converted); (4) bias-vector l2/cosine inversion promoted to SCORED DV C1b; (5) use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor replaces the 485i/485j bespoke per-seed floor calibration; per-seed readiness preconditions (>=2/3, the 485k aggregate-max bug fix / 642 same-statistic miss). claim_ids=[SD-033b,MECH-263]. PROMOTES NOTHING. CLEARS a re-derive brake on SD-033b/MECH-263 (>=2 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies): named upstream substrate MECH-449 now BUILT/VALIDATED (689g PASS) + use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor (689e PASS). Dry-run smoke PASS: ARM_2 excluded=5/nogo_applied=1/cosine -0.70, ARM_0 frozen nogo_applied=0 (dissociation holds); readiness self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry-scale (full-scale trains the head).
